moves_info.name: Fireball
moves_info.description: Deal 100% of your ATT and lower the enemy's evasion to 0 for [1] Turn

moves_info.name: Refreshing Water
moves_info.description: Gain 20% of your mana and give an ally [2] ATT for [2] Turns

moves_info.name: Distraction
moves_info.description: Redirect 25% of DMG done to allies to this unit instead

moves_info.name: Kick Spin
moves_info.description: Deal 50% of your ATT to all enemy units

moves_info.name: SHOOT!!!
moves_info.description: Deal 100% of your ATT; 25% chance to do double damage

moves_info.name: Taunt
moves_info.description: Force all enemies to attack this unit for this turn

moves_info.name: Heal
moves_info.description: Heal 25% of an ally's or yourself's HP

moves_info.name: Elbow Dive
moves_info.description: Deal 40% of your ATT to all enemies

moves_info.name: Iron Heart
moves_info.description: Allies gain Magdalena's 15% of her HP as ATT for [1] Turn
